content.en:
There are still more than 900 trillion solstices in the Dao Era before the arrival of the Jialanbao ship, and there is still plenty of time, and the supreme forces of all parties are also actively preparing.

Coupled with the acquisition of the resources of the Demon Seed Abyss, many peak realm gods felt that it was no problem to obtain a place with the ship.

Of course, there are also pinnacle realm gods who aim for the staff quota of the Garanbao ship.

Time flies.

In the blink of an eye, tens of trillions of Dao epochs have passed.

At this time, there were only nine hundred billion solstice era left before the arrival of the Jialanbao Ship, and it seemed that there was still a long time, but in fact, for the peak realm gods, this time was nothing.

Ye Tian did not hesitate to spend a lot of resources to help himself refine the Eternal Dao Seed, and also help his relatives to refine the Eternal Dao Seed.

However, at this time, there were supreme forces with other thoughts.

......

Xuandong Mountain.

This is one of the supreme forces, and its strength is stronger than the original Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace.

this day.

The most powerful peak realm gods of Xuandong Mountain sat together to discuss an important matter.

These are the Xuanlong Realm God, the White Mountain Realm God, the Nine Tai Realm God, and the Six Cave Realm Gods.

These four peak realm gods, the lowest cultivation is 340 condensing eleven Eternal Realm Spirits, and each of them is a perfect-level Eternal Dao Species, and the cultivation is also a Perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit.

In terms of strength, each of them is not weaker than Ye Tian.

"Xuanlong Realm God, tell me what to do, there are only nine hundred billion Dao Era left before the arrival of the Jialanbao Ship, and there are only ten trillion Dao Era left before the arrival of the extradimensional storm!"

Six Cave Realm Shinto.

"We can't choose to follow the ship, if we follow the ship, the number of places is uncertain, and the Galanbo ship may not necessarily lead us into those powerful territories, if we want to enter the powerful territory, we have to pay more Galanbo coins, how much they will get, they have to say. If we don't have enough Gala Coins, there's a good chance we'll only be able to disembark in a territory that isn't very powerful. In that case, there is no point in leaving our territory. The Nine Platforms Realm God frowned.

The Xuanlong Realm God nodded, "The employee quota is also a pit, why are the six Supreme Realm Gods not enough to buy the employee quota, is it really what they said, hehe, it's not because the employee quota is very pitted, they know the inside story, and they don't want to be an employee of the Jialanbao Ship at all." The ordinary employees of the Galanbao ship don't get much training at all, and they have very little time to cultivate, most of the time they have to help (AFED) work, and even some exploration tasks are done by ordinary employees, and the chance of falling is greater. Only a very small number of employees finally grow up, comprehend the true power of the extra-dimensional, and be promoted to the half-step extra-dimensional realm or even the extra-dimensional realm. "

"Yes, unless it is the kind of peak realm god who is only one step away from comprehending the transcendent realm, but lacks inheritance, joining the Jialan Treasure Ship may be a good choice. But if you join the Garanbol ship, you can't get out of the Garanbo ship. The Six Cave Realm God said.

"Then if we don't choose to follow the Garanbao ship and don't want to stay here, there is only one way!"

The gaze of the Xuanlong Realm God became fierce.

The same was true of several other peak realm gods, their expressions becoming grim and solemn.

"Cooperate with the Ice Ghost Organization!"

They all had this idea in their minds.

The Ice Ghost Organization is a force in the 326th Territory, which specializes in plundering the resources of some weak territories.

The Garanbao ship is walking in many territories to do business, although the difference in price earned in the middle is very exaggerated, and even sells the ordinary resources of some territories to other territories at a very high price, but at least it is still a good thing.

After all, some resources are very common in some territories, so the price is very low, but some territories do not have such resources, so naturally they have to be sold more expensive, which is reasonable.

The Garan Treasure Ship does not kill, and even a weak peak realm god can enter the Garan Treasure Ship trade with peace of mind.

So, the reputation of the Garanbao ship is very good.

But the Ice Ghost Organization is different, they like to kill, loot resources, and their strength is not as strong as the Ga Lan Bao Ship, but it is not comparable to their supreme forces.

This time, the Ice Ghost Organization was eyeing their Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-Two Territory, because their territory was really weak, although some of the Realm Gods who went out had been born in the Half-Step Extradimensional Realm.

It's a pity that the half-step extradimensional realm will not come back, which is equivalent to uselessness.

The Ice Ghost Organization didn't have a half-step transcendent realm, but there were many top-level peak realm gods, enough to sweep through their territory.

After all, many peak realm gods are collecting resources, and once they invade, they can just harvest directly.

However, it is very difficult to cross the boundary extradimensional barrier, and even a half-step extradimensional realm cannot be done, and the ice ghost organization does not have a half-step extradimensional realm, and with its own strength, it is naturally impossible to cross the boundary extradimensional barrier.

However, there are some special formations that can still temporarily pass through the extradimensional barrier, but they don't last long and consume a lot of energy.

It was by relying on this special extradimensional formation that the Ice Ghost Organization was able to rob some weaker territories and do things that even a half-step extradimensional realm could not do.

Of course. []

It's also because the Ice Ghost Organization is very cautious and only targets weaker territories, so it's still alive and well.

If they dare to cooperate with the Ice Ghost Organization, they naturally need to make a contract with the Ice Ghost Organization, and the Ice Ghost Organization will not harm them at that time.

And what they need to do is to arrange a super-dimensional formation in their territory, and this extra-dimensional formation can be connected to the formation organized by the ice ghosts.

In this way, the Ice Ghost Organization only needs to pay one-tenth of the price to shuttle over.

Otherwise, forcibly using the extra-dimensional formation to shuttle over, the price paid is too great, and you can't make too much.

And the advantage they get by cooperating with the Ice Ghost Organization is that they can leave this territory with the Ice Ghost Organization, and after leaving, the two sides do not need to cooperate, and go their separate ways.

But in doing so, they will be tantamount to betraying other supreme forces, and once exposed, they will also be very troublesome.

The other supreme forces will definitely not let them go, unless the ice ghost organization kills all the peak realm gods of these supreme forces, but obviously it can't be done, and there will definitely be many peak realm gods who escape.

Therefore, if they really unite with the Ice Ghost Organization, they must be careful not to expose it.

"Do you want to cooperate with the Ice Ghost Organization?"

The Six Cave Realm God asked.

The other peak realm gods pondered for a long time, discussed with each other again, and finally came to a decision.

"Cooperate with the Ice Ghost Organization!"

They spoke in unison.

There is no way, they are all under the threat of extradimensional assimilation, and they have swallowed a lot of various pills and other resources that inhibit extradimensional assimilation, and the effect is not very good.

Moreover, the next hundred extradimensional epochs after the Galanbol ship will not come.

And they can't last a hundred extradimensional years, so they must seek new hope.

Since you don't choose to follow the ship and buy staff places, there is only one way to cooperate with the Ice Ghost Organization.
